title: Complexity, Timing, Profiling, Memory, and Capacity
description: A team optimizes string concatenation from one warm run, reports elapsed time without input size, never measures memory, and ships a faster tokenizer that changes word policy. Learners cumulatively produce correctness-preserving capacity study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: State workload, input scale, expected complexity, environment, metric, budget, and correctness invariant before measuring.
Use repeated controlled timing, warmup decisions, robust summaries, and noise disclosure rather than one stopwatch value.
Use cProfile or a justified profiler to locate cumulative work before selecting a repair.
